---
title: "Publications"
---

Find the full list of publications in my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LssYeuUAAAAJ&hl=en).
<!-- ## Selected Publications

Replace these placeholders with your own publications.

### Journal Articles

1. Author Name, Author Name, and Your Name. "Paper Title." *Journal Name*, Year.

### Conference Papers

1. Your Name and Coauthor Name. "Conference Paper Title." *Conference Name*, Year.

### Preprints

1. Your Name. "Preprint Title." *arXiv* or repository, Year.

## Notes

You can also organize this page by year or add links to DOI, PDF, code, or supplementary material. -->
